title: GPT-5.5 is a total freak
summary: AI Search channel published a review of OpenAI's GPT-5.5 model, testing its performance across tasks including code generation, rendering, cancer detection, music composition, 3D video game creation, and research capabilities. The review evaluates benchmarks, hallucinations, and specifications to assess where the model excels.
